[[File:MW.png]]

'''Modern Warfare''' is a [[Instagib|instagib]] mod. It was created by Scazzarus with help of other members at GU. It is popular for its flashy graphics, and over powered weapons. Most common setting picked is [[Mortars]]. Mortars is usually played by newcomers to the game. Though there are some long time LieroX players who play the setting on occation as well. Mostly Mortars is not considered a good setting among many long time LX players, which again lays out a conflict between new and old players.

Another setting is the limited version for this game. [[MW Limited]] which is played in 100lt with many weapon bans.

<table cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" class="collapsible" style="background:#FFFFFF;" width="100%">
<table cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" class="collapsible" style="background:#FFFFFF;" width="100%">
<tr>
<th class="MainPageBG" style="margin:0; background: #EFEFE6; font-size:100%; font-weight:bold; border:1px solid #D5D2D2; text-align:left; color:#000; padding:0.2em 0.4em;" width="100%"> <center>Popular Mods</center>
</th></tr>
<tr>
<td style="background: white; color:#000; margin:0; border:1px solid #a3bfb1; text-align:left; color:#000; padding:0.2em 0.4em;"> <center>   [[Liero 1.0]] | [[Liero 1.11]] | <strong class="selflink">Modern Warfare</strong> | [[Cruel]] | [[8-Bit Warfare]] | [[Food Fight]] | [[WH40k]] | [[MSF]] | [[Trick or Treat]]   </center>
</td></tr></table>
<p><br/>
</p>
<tr><td></td></tr>
</table>

[[Category:Mods]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20130323190052/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/Modern_Warfare -->
